data.title: Cloud-first Infrastructure
data.description: Microsoft utilizes Azure for its cloud services, providing scalable and flexible architecture.
data.technical_spec: Azure Kubernetes Service, Azure Functions, Load Balancers

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: The site relies on a microservices architecture to improve modularity and scalability.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Uses a global CDN to deliver content efficiently to users worldwide.

data.title: Responsive Web Design
data.description: Ensures that the website is accessible and visually appealing on all devices.

data.title: Service-Oriented Architecture (SOA)
data.description: Promotes loose coupling between the site’s services for flexibility and efficiency.
